patch.value: Parse/serialize todo.txt: x done marker, (A)-(Z) priority, +project/@context tags, due:YYYY-MM-DD. Map priority letters<->pm numeric, projects/contexts<->tags, due<->deadline, completion<->status.

author: codex

patch.value: Shipped todo.txt import+export via --format todotxt. parseTodoTxt/serializeTodoTxt handle x marker, (A-Z) priority, +project/@context->tags, due:->deadline, completion->status. Functionally verified: imported hand-written todo.txt, fields mapped correctly (prio/tags/due/status), lossless round-trip re-export.

message: Shipped todo.txt import+export via --format todotxt. parseTodoTxt/serializeTodoTxt handle x marker, (A-Z) priority, +project/@context->tags, due:->deadline, completion->status. Functionally verified: imported hand-written todo.txt, fields mapped correctly (prio/tags/due/status), lossless round-trip re-export.
